div.p: Technical Specification: AMD64 ABI Section 4.4 Calculation Formula: patch_value = S + A Symbolic Interpretation: 64-bit direct absolute relocation without PC-relative bias.

p.em: Note: While P is calculated, R_X86_64_64 ignores P in the formula (unlike R_X86_64_PC32).

ol.li: Overflow: No overflow check required for 64-bit absolute.
